source_name: Australian Bureau of Meteorology Climate statistics for Australian locations
used_for: Temperature, hot days, rainfall, rain days, solar exposure, humidity, cloud and station locations.
notes: Monthly climate statistics use all suitable years of record for each station and variable; years differ by station and element.

source_name: Australian Bureau of Statistics Regional population, 2024-25
used_for: Capital city population and annual growth context, combined into map tooltips and summary data.
notes: Population refers to Estimated Resident Population at 30 June 2025 for Greater Capital City Statistical Areas.

used_for: Australia context outline for Vega-Lite maps.
notes: Only the Australia feature is retained in the processed GeoJSON to keep downloadable data small.
